message: No-op fixer revises are reported as applied fixes.
evidence: ContractRevise can return success with Changed=false for unchanged contracts, but runContractReviewFixRound ignores the response body and always returns applied=1 after a nil reviseErr.

message: Contract-review fixer attempts are launched write-enabled, so edits are not constrained to the version-guarded contract revise path.
evidence: runContractReviewFixerAttempt sets ReadOnly=false and BuildACPWouldRun(..., false), allowing the fixer agent to mutate files directly before the parsed revise payload is applied through ContractRevise.

message: The contract-review fixer is resolved through the executor role instead of the drafter/reviewer role used by contract drafting.
evidence: runContractReviewFixRound calls resolveExecutorEntry(config, "") and resolveAgentForRole(..., agentRoleExecutor); contract drafting uses resolveReviewerEntry and agentRoleReviewer.

message: The empty contract.reviewers JSON path changes the slice-1 no-op response shape instead of preserving existing behavior.
evidence: The no-reviewer branch now builds contractReviewLoopResponse with schema pactum.contract_review_loop.v1 and rounds, replacing the prior contractReviewResponse shape with top-level findings and skipped_lenses.

message: The contract-review fixer has an explicit branch rejecting a revise payload that changes contract.goal, but no test emits a goal-changing fixer revise or asserts that this is skipped and warned.
evidence: The helper switch only emits a valid revise or stale-version revise, while internal/app/contract_review.go:559 rejects goal-changing revise payloads.

message: The fixer agent failure path is untested; current helper modes always exit 0, so the branch that records runErr as a skipped fix is not covered.
evidence: TestContractReviewFixerHelperProcess exits 0 unconditionally, while internal/app/contract_review.go:521 handles fixer attempt failure.

message: Unused test helper wrapper `contractReviewFixerAttemptPaths` adds no behavior and has no callers.
evidence: `contractReviewFixerAttemptPaths` only wraps `agentAttemptPaths(runPaths.ContractFixerAttemptsDir, attemptID)`, and `rg "contractReviewFixerAttemptPaths\\(" .` finds only this definition.

message: SECURITY.md still lists pactum contract review as a read-only stage, but the new convergence loop can launch a write-enabled contract fixer.
evidence: SECURITY.md says contract review is read-only; internal/app/contract_review.go configures the new contract fixer attempt with ReadOnly: false.

message: docs/contract-review-design.md still documents contract review as the slice-1 behavior with no auto-fixer and says the convergence loop is deferred to slice 2, but this change implements that slice.
evidence: The design doc says no auto-fixer and defers convergence to slice 2; internal/app/contract_review.go now runs the fixer convergence loop when reviewers are configured.
